descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes playoff game recap with goals from Talo, Clarke, Phare, Walton, Lamb, and Bobbitt against Delta.
descriptionLong: Game recap of a Richmond Sockeyes playoff matchup against Delta. The Sockeyes scored goals from Jason Talo, Rob Clarke, Kirk Phare, Dan Walton, Garth Lamb, and Tony Bobbitt, while Delta responded with goals from Brian Bethard, Ray Savard, Jim Kambeitz, and Darren Schwartz. Game three of the series was scheduled for Friday at Delta's Sungod Arena.
